name: eresus-pr-security-review
description: Security-focused pull request and diff review skill for finding newly introduced vulnerabilities, risky regressions, and missing security tests in changed code. Trigger when the user asks to: "review this PR for security", "check this diff for vulns", "do a security code review", "audit changed files", or wants findings on a patch instead of a full-repo scan. Best used alongside eresus-sast-scanner.
